tagline: Onimoran owo ori AI fun Naijiria, 2026.
aboutBody: Mai Filer je ipese AI fun sisan owo ori ni Naijiria. O n beere awon ibeere, o n ka awon iwe re, o n se isiro owo ori, o n salaye naira kookan, o si n pese awon faili ti o wa fun NRS. Gegebi TurboTax ati TaxSlayer — sugbon ti a bi ni akoko AI.

chat.title: Iforowanilenuwo pelu Mai Filer
chat.subtitle: Faili owo ori re nipase iforowanilenuwo.
chat.placeholder: Beere Mai ohunkohun — payslip, PIT, idinku, awon igbese to tele…
chat.emptyHint: Gbiyanju: "Mo n gba ₦5,000,000 lodun. Kini PIT mi fun 2026?"

identity.title: Jeri ara re
identity.subtitle: A n ba NIN re sowo alase to ni ase saaju ki a to pese eyikeyi faili.
identity.ninHelper: Nomba mokanla. A ko ni fi NIN re pamo bi ose — eko ti a fi pamo nikan pelu hash.
identity.nameLabel: Oruko ni pipe (gege bi iwo yoo se fe ki o wa lori faili)
identity.nameHelper: A fi iwe yi we igbasile NIN, a o si samo iyato kan lati jeki e tun wo.
identity.consentBody: Mo gba fun Mai Filer lati wa igbasile NIMC fun NIN yi lati se iranlowo fun fifi owo ori mi. Mo ye pe NIN mi ni a o fi pamo ati pe a o ni igbasile ti ipinnu naa.
identity.consentCheckbox: Mo gba ati pe mo fun ni ifiyesi.
identity.resultNotVerified: A ko le jeri NIN yi
identity.nameMatchStrict: Oruko naa baramu si igbasile NIN gangan.
identity.nameMatchMismatch: Oruko naa ko baramu si igbasile NIN. Tun wo o saaju ki o to fi ranse.

ngo.title: NGO annual return
ngo.subtitle: Record your exempt body's income, expenditure, and WHT remitted. Placeholder statutory rules apply; confirm before filing.
ngo.placeholderBanner: This form uses illustrative 2026 NRS rules pending owner confirmation. Do not file the pack until `ngo_rules.py` is replaced with confirmed values.
ngo.exemptionDeclaration: Trustees affirm the organisation continues to meet the tax-exempt criteria for this year.
ngo.signatoryDeclaration: Authorised signatory affirms this return is true and complete.

sme.title: SME calculators (preview)
sme.subtitle: Live CIT, WHT, and UBL 3.0 envelope validation against the placeholder statutory tables.
sme.placeholderBanner: Illustrative 2026 rules — the owner must supply confirmed NRS CIT bands, WHT rates, and the 55-field UBL list before this surface is used for real filings.
sme.ublHelp: Paste a full envelope JSON to validate against the 8-section / 55-field invariant.

dashboard.title: Dashboard Mai Filer re
dashboard.subtitle: Itan owo ori lati odun de odun, awon iyato, ati awon ikilo larin odun.
dashboard.filtersYtdLabel: Gross lati ibere odun (fun awon ikilo)
dashboard.factsEmpty: Ko si awon otito sibe. Lehin ti o ba fi file ranse (tabi apere), Mai yoo fi awon pataki pamo sibi.
dashboard.anomaliesEmpty: Ko si iyipada pataki lati odun de odun.
dashboard.nudgesEmpty: Ko si ohunkohun lati samo bayi. Pada lehin owo osu tabi iwe-ise to nbo.
